ogTitle: Cambewarra Village vs Cambra: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cambewarra Village and Cambra.
heading: Cambewarra Village vs Cambra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cambewarra Village, New South Wales and Cambra, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cambewarra Village has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Cambra (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cambewarra Village or Cambra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cambewarra Village has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Cambra scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cambewarra Village scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Cambra scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cambewarra Village or Cambra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cambewarra Village has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
